scripts.start: pnpm run build && set ELECTRON_DISABLE_CRASH_REPORTER=1&& set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron .
scripts.test:cashflow: pnpm run build && node dist/test/cashflow-state-machine.test.js && node dist/test/cashflow-persistence.test.js && node dist/test/cashflow-plugin-contract.test.js && node dist/test/cashflow-performance.test.js
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:portable: pnpm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.release:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip -p always
scripts.release:win: pnpm run build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64 -p always
